{{Infobox construct
| name = Broken Crown
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Broken Crown is a [[Divine Treasure]] that serves as the official trophy for the top eight participants of the [[Uncrowned]] [[King]] tournament. These unique constructs are implanted into the souls of the winning warriors to serve as eternal proof of their battlefield achievements and strength. Beyond acting as a symbol of status, the Broken Crown identifies the recipients as agents representing their specific [[Monarch]]. While they do not grant additional power, the constructs are impossible to fake or remove, with the exception of those taken from a [[Remnant]]. The visual appearance of a Broken Crown is determined by the [[madra]] of the warrior's [[Monarch]]; for example, they may appear as black halos or take on colors such as red, gold, or white to match the representative's lineage.}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Broken Crown]] is a [[Divine Treasure]] implanted in the souls of the [[Uncrowned]] warriors.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Broken Crown]]'s constructs are colored based on the [[madra]] of the representative’s [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ziel]]'s signature is a [[Broken Crown]] the red of [[blood madra]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Broken Crown]] is a unique treasure earned by the top eight of each tournament.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c16">''Bloodline'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Ziel]]'s [[Broken Crown]] is a black halo split in the middle.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c19">''Dreadgod'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Uncrowned Queen]]'s [[Broken Crown]] hovers over her head.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c22">''Dreadgod'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Ziel]]'s [[Broken Crown]] could theoretically be used to create a link.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
